title: claytonia perfoliata var. parviflora
intro: Claytonia perfoliata var. parviflora, also known as smallflower miner's lettuce, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the purslane family (Portulacaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its high content of vitamins A and C, as well as minerals such as calcium and iron. It is used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, salad green, or added to soups and other dishes, making it a versatile and nutritious addition to a healthy diet.
